name: Evaluator-generation guidance benchmark
why: The generate-evaluator skill teaches users how to build scoring functions for optimize-anything. Improving it should make future optimization workflows easier to run, debug, and validate.
objective: Improve the evaluator-generation guidance so it helps maintainers create reliable evaluators with clear JSON contracts, runnable examples, diagnostic feedback, calibration guidance, and concise acceptance criteria.
constraints: Preserve the SKILL.md frontmatter and trigger intent.
Keep the artifact useful as an instruction file, not a marketing page.
Explain the evaluator JSON contract, including candidate input and numeric score output.
Include runnable command examples for generating and testing evaluators.
Tell maintainers how to diagnose weak or non-discriminating evaluators.
Do not overwrite the tracked source artifact during benchmark runs.
